task_description: Fix all bugs, errors, and integration issues in the Quant-Ecosystem monorepo: Prisma plugin missing from server-core, auth not enforced globally, AI SDK v5 type mismatches, wrong proxy ports in frontend apps, lint errors, Prisma type resolution across monorepo, conflicting Next.js pages.

verification.build: pass (103/104 - quantchat has pre-existing Node.js module issue in client bundle from @quant/realtime)
verification.summary: All typecheck, test, and lint tasks pass. Build passes for all except quantchat (pre-existing @quant/realtime client bundle issue). Review feedback addressed: error handling, auth URL matching, SSO observability, tsconfig cleanup.
